text.message: Going to r in your game now
And then placed on me again
When you have a double five
Literally the saddest thing to be upset about lol go touch some grass
I can assure you i am more successful by every conceivable metric
Then we’re on the same page
I’d love to hear about this success
I’d rather not share personal information
You can choose to beleive or not
But you asked me to touch grass
And so I’m explaining that it’s not a relevant comeback here
“I can guarantee I’m more successful by every inconceivable measure” lmaooooo
Like I said I stand by my comments
Maybe it’s presumptive to assume I’m more succesful
If you’ve got the maturity of a toddler then idk what to even say
I don’t know who you are
